activities.summaryZh: 春末强度线，重点训练爬升与下撤节奏。
activities.summaryEn: A high-intensity spring route focused on climbing and descent rhythm.
detailZh: 集合后完成装备抽检与天气窗口确认，分为快慢两组出发。
中段设置补给点并进行队列压缩，避免体能断层。
全程无事故，复盘建议加强登山杖使用训练与下坡脚踝保护。
detailEn: After gear check and weather-window confirmation, the team started in two pacing groups.
A mid-route supply checkpoint was used to compress the formation and control pace gaps.
No incidents occurred; post-event review emphasized trekking-pole use and downhill ankle protection.

activities.locationZh: Rideau 运河与 Arboretum 环线
activities.summaryZh: 节奏友好的城市环线，重点验证新成员编队纪律。
activities.summaryEn: A beginner-friendly city loop used to validate new-member riding discipline.
detailZh: 分三段补水与车况检查，确保新成员能稳定跟骑。
通过路口采取前后哨策略，显著减少停车等待。
活动后统计显示平均巡航速度较上一期提升 9%。
detailEn: Hydration and bike checks were conducted in three stages for stable group riding.
Front-and-rear marshal control at intersections reduced stop-and-wait time.
Post-event metrics showed a 9% improvement in average cruising speed.

activities.locationZh: 渥太华河 Shirleys Bay--Aylmer Island 段
activities.titleZh: 渥太华河日落沙滩桨板局
activities.summaryZh: 5:30pm集合，稳定水域轻松路线，电动桨板支持适合新手。
activities.summaryEn: A calm-water route suitable for first-time paddlers.
